# UC-22.2.10 ¬∑ NIS2 Cyber Hygiene and Training Compliance

## Description

Measures organization-wide security awareness training freshness by ingesting LMS completion rows ‚ÄĒ including course identifiers ‚ÄĒ and flags anyone overdue against a 365-day policy so hygiene evidence can be joined to leadership dashboards.

## Value

Boards and competent authorities increasingly ask for proof that human-facing controls (training cadence, phishing drill outcomes) keep pace with operational risk; this workflow turns HR and Microsoft 365 telemetry into a repeatable percentage and overdue headcount without waiting for annual PDF exports.

## Implementation

(1) Publish `nis2_training_completion.csv` nightly via HEC or `outputlookup` from your LMS API worker. (2) Map Microsoft 365 phishing campaigns into `index=email` using TA 4055 MessageTrace modules if simulations land there. (3) Alert when `compliance_pct` < 90. (4) Correlate overdue users with `index=auth` notables via `lookup` on `employee_id`. (5) Archive weekly evidence to `audit_evidence`.

## Detailed Implementation

Prerequisites
‚ÄĘ Splunk Search Head with **Lookup Editor** or `lookups/` directory permissions; role `nis2_training_auditor` can `inputlookup` + `outputlookup` but cannot delete indexes.
‚ÄĘ HTTP Event Collector token restricted to `index=training` `sourcetype=lms:completion` (Settings ‚Üí Data inputs ‚Üí HTTP Event Collector).
‚ÄĘ Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Office 365 ([Splunkbase 4055](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4055)) ‚Č•4.7 installed on search tier with an Azure AD application registration granted `Report.Read.All` if phishing metrics come from Graph reports feeding `ms:o365:management`.
‚ÄĘ Baseline CSV schema: `employee_id`, `completion_date`, `course_id`, `department`, optional `worker_type`, `leave_status`. File stored at `$SPLUNK_HOME/etc/apps/TA-nis2-compliance/lookups/nis2_training_completion.csv` with version control.

Step 1 ‚ÄĒ Configure data collection
‚ÄĘ LMS pipeline: schedule worker every 6 hours to POST JSON `{ "employee_id":"E123", "completion_date":"2026-04-01", "course_id":"SEC-101" }` to HEC URI `/services/collector/event` with `Authorization: Splunk <token>`.
‚ÄĘ props.conf stanza:
```ini
[lms:completion]
TIME_PREFIX = "completion_date"\s*:\s*
TIME_FORMAT = %Y-%m-%d
SHOULD_LINEMERGE = false
```
‚ÄĘ Office 365 TA: under **Inputs**, enable the management activity input that maps phishing simulation summaries; validate `index=email` event count via `| tstats prestats=t count FROM datamodel=Authentication WHERE index=email` (optional mapping).
‚ÄĘ Expected volume: 1 event per employee per course per year ‚Čą `headcount √ó courses` ‚ÄĒ plan <50 MB/year for 10k staff.

Step 2 ‚ÄĒ Create the search and alert
Reuse the `spl` field verbatim for the aggregate KPI. Create a secondary drilldown:
```spl
| inputlookup nis2_training_completion.csv
| eval overdue=if(round((now()-strptime(completion_date,"%Y-%m-%d"))/86400,0)>365,1,0)
| where overdue=1
| table employee_id, department, course_id, completion_date
```
Schedule alert **UC-22.2.10-overdue** weekly Monday 07:00 with `where overdue_count>25` after first search (use savedsearch chaining).

Step 3 ‚ÄĒ Validate
‚ÄĘ Sample 10 employees: compare CSV `completion_date` to LMS UI; discrepancy >1 day indicates timezone ‚ÄĒ set `strftime`/`strptime` with `%z`.
‚ÄĘ Run `| inputlookup nis2_training_completion.csv | stats dc(employee_id)` vs HR headcount feed; investigate gaps.
‚ÄĘ For Microsoft 365 phishing metrics (if enabled), compare Splunk row counts to **Security ‚Üí Email & collaboration ‚Üí Attack simulation training** portal for the same `campaign_id`.

Step 4 ‚ÄĒ Operationalize
‚ÄĘ Dashboard: KPI row, overdue table, 12-week trend (`timechart` wrapper around summary index).
‚ÄĘ Process: GRC team exports signed CSV monthly per `evidenceSigning`; attach to NIS2 Art.21(2)(g) folder.
‚ÄĘ Integrate: push overdue `employee_id` list to ServiceNow `sn_hr_core` update set via scripted alert action.

Step 5 ‚ÄĒ Troubleshooting
‚ÄĘ **Empty lookup** ‚ÄĒ worker failed; check HEC ack returns a JSON payload whose text field reads Success and `_internal` `tail http_event_collector`.
‚ÄĘ **compliance_pct>100 artifact** ‚ÄĒ duplicate keys; run `| stats count by employee_id | where count>1`.
‚ÄĘ **All users overdue after DST shift** ‚ÄĒ fix `TIME_FORMAT` missing offset.
‚ÄĘ **ms:o365:management silence** ‚ÄĒ renew Azure certificate or rotate client secret in TA configuration UI.


## SPL

```spl
| inputlookup nis2_training_completion.csv
| eval days_since_training=round((now()-strptime(completion_date,"%Y-%m-%d"))/86400, 0)
| eval overdue=if(days_since_training > 365 OR isnull(completion_date), 1, 0)
| stats count as total_staff, sum(overdue) as overdue_count, avg(days_since_training) as avg_days_since
| eval compliance_pct=round(100*(total_staff-overdue_count)/total_staff, 1)
| table total_staff, overdue_count, compliance_pct, avg_days_since
```

## Visualization

Single value compliance %, bar chart by department from lookup field, line chart of rolling overdue count, table drilldown to employee_id.
